title: Kafka consumer lag after deployment
description: Consumer group lag spiked after a new release and messages stopped clearing from the topic
resolution: Increased consumer replicas and reset a misconfigured max.poll.records value
content: Kafka consumer lag after deployment Consumer group lag spiked after a new release and messages stopped clearing from the topic Increased consumer replicas and reset a misconfigured max.poll.records value Kafka

title: Kafka broker disk nearly full
description: Alerts showed broker storage above ninety percent during peak ingest
resolution: Applied retention cleanup and moved older segments to expanded storage
content: Kafka broker disk nearly full Alerts showed broker storage above ninety percent during peak ingest Applied retention cleanup and moved older segments to expanded storage Kafka

title: Kafka producer timeout in payment service
description: Payment service logs showed repeated request timeout errors while publishing events
resolution: Updated bootstrap server list and increased request timeout to match network latency
content: Kafka producer timeout in payment service Payment service logs showed repeated request timeout errors while publishing events Updated bootstrap server list and increased request timeout to match network latency Kafka

title: Kafka SASL authentication failure
description: Clients could not connect after password rotation and returned authentication exceptions
resolution: Rotated the client secret in the deployment and restarted affected pods
content: Kafka SASL authentication failure Clients could not connect after password rotation and returned authentication exceptions Rotated the client secret in the deployment and restarted affected pods Auth

title: Kubernetes pod CrashLoopBackOff on api gateway
description: Gateway pod restarted continuously after config change
resolution: Fixed invalid environment variable and rolled out corrected deployment
content: Kubernetes pod CrashLoopBackOff on api gateway Gateway pod restarted continuously after config change Fixed invalid environment variable and rolled out corrected deployment Kubernetes

title: Kubernetes image pull back-off in staging
description: New worker pods failed to pull a private image from registry
resolution: Refreshed imagePullSecret and re-ran deployment
content: Kubernetes image pull back-off in staging New worker pods failed to pull a private image from registry Refreshed imagePullSecret and re-ran deployment Kubernetes

title: Kubernetes ingress returns 502
description: Users saw bad gateway responses from the ingress during service migration
resolution: Updated service port mapping and reloaded ingress controller
content: Kubernetes ingress returns 502 Users saw bad gateway responses from the ingress during service migration Updated service port mapping and reloaded ingress controller Kubernetes

title: Kubernetes node NotReady alert
description: A node stopped reporting healthy status after kernel patching
resolution: Drained the node rebooted it and allowed kubelet to rejoin the cluster
content: Kubernetes node NotReady alert A node stopped reporting healthy status after kernel patching Drained the node rebooted it and allowed kubelet to rejoin the cluster Kubernetes

title: Docker container exits immediately on startup
description: Container terminated because the entrypoint expected a missing config file
resolution: Mounted the config volume correctly and rebuilt the image
content: Docker container exits immediately on startup Container terminated because the entrypoint expected a missing config file Mounted the config volume correctly and rebuilt the image Docker

title: Docker daemon permission denied on build
description: CI runners failed with permission denied while accessing docker socket
resolution: Added runner user to docker group and rotated the runner
content: Docker daemon permission denied on build CI runners failed with permission denied while accessing docker socket Added runner user to docker group and rotated the runner Docker

title: FastAPI service returns 422 on health probes
description: Load balancer called the wrong route format and received validation errors
resolution: Added a dedicated GET health endpoint and updated probe path
content: FastAPI service returns 422 on health probes Load balancer called the wrong route format and received validation errors Added a dedicated GET health endpoint and updated probe path FastAPI

title: FastAPI startup failure due to missing dependency
description: Application would not boot because sentence-transformers was not installed in the environment
resolution: Pinned missing package in requirements and rebuilt the environment
content: FastAPI startup failure due to missing dependency Application would not boot because sentence-transformers was not installed in the environment Pinned missing package in requirements and rebuilt the environment FastAPI

title: VPN users cannot access internal wiki
description: Remote users reported timeout when loading the documentation portal
resolution: Updated route advertisement and restarted the VPN gateway
content: VPN users cannot access internal wiki Remote users reported timeout when loading the documentation portal Updated route advertisement and restarted the VPN gateway Network

title: DNS resolution intermittent in dev subnet
description: Pods in one subnet failed to resolve external package hosts
resolution: Restarted CoreDNS and corrected upstream resolver policy
content: DNS resolution intermittent in dev subnet Pods in one subnet failed to resolve external package hosts Restarted CoreDNS and corrected upstream resolver policy Network

title: Single sign-on login loop in support portal
description: Users were redirected back to sign-in repeatedly after successful identity provider auth
resolution: Fixed callback URL mismatch in SSO configuration
content: Single sign-on login loop in support portal Users were redirected back to sign-in repeatedly after successful identity provider auth Fixed callback URL mismatch in SSO configuration Auth

title: Expired TLS certificate on internal dashboard
description: Browser security warnings blocked access to the dashboard
resolution: Renewed certificate and updated secret in ingress namespace
content: Expired TLS certificate on internal dashboard Browser security warnings blocked access to the dashboard Renewed certificate and updated secret in ingress namespace Security

title: Database connection pool exhausted
description: API latency increased and requests started failing under load
resolution: Raised pool size and fixed leaked sessions in background worker
content: Database connection pool exhausted API latency increased and requests started failing under load Raised pool size and fixed leaked sessions in background worker Database

title: Redis cache miss storm after deploy
description: Read latency increased because cache keys changed unexpectedly
resolution: Restored prior key format and warmed cache asynchronously
content: Redis cache miss storm after deploy Read latency increased because cache keys changed unexpectedly Restored prior key format and warmed cache asynchronously Cache

title: Kafka schema registry compatibility error
description: Producer deployment failed when registering an incompatible schema
resolution: Switched compatibility mode to backward and corrected field evolution
content: Kafka schema registry compatibility error Producer deployment failed when registering an incompatible schema Switched compatibility mode to backward and corrected field evolution Kafka

title: Kubernetes PVC stuck pending
description: Stateful workload would not schedule because persistent volume claim stayed pending
resolution: Created matching storage class and expanded default quota
content: Kubernetes PVC stuck pending Stateful workload would not schedule because persistent volume claim stayed pending Created matching storage class and expanded default quota Kubernetes

title: OAuth token expiry too short for cli users
description: Engineers were forced to reauthenticate every few minutes
resolution: Extended token lifetime policy for approved internal clients
content: OAuth token expiry too short for cli users Engineers were forced to reauthenticate every few minutes Extended token lifetime policy for approved internal clients Auth

title: Packet loss between app and broker tier
description: Consumer lag correlated with intermittent packet drops between subnets
resolution: Adjusted firewall appliance policy and moved traffic off a saturated link
content: Packet loss between app and broker tier Consumer lag correlated with intermittent packet drops between subnets Adjusted firewall appliance policy and moved traffic off a saturated link Network

title: Kafka consumer rebalance thrashing
description: Consumers repeatedly rebalanced causing lag and duplicate processing
resolution: Stabilized group membership with static group instance IDs and tuned session timeout
content: Kafka consumer rebalance thrashing Consumers repeatedly rebalanced causing lag and duplicate processing Stabilized group membership with static group instance IDs and tuned session timeout Kafka

title: Docker build cache invalidated every run
description: Build times doubled after Dockerfile changes removed effective layer caching
resolution: Reordered Dockerfile instructions to isolate dependency installation
content: Docker build cache invalidated every run Build times doubled after Dockerfile changes removed effective layer caching Reordered Dockerfile instructions to isolate dependency installation Docker

title: FastAPI CORS errors in frontend demo
description: Browser blocked requests from React app to local API
resolution: Enabled CORSMiddleware for local development origins
content: FastAPI CORS errors in frontend demo Browser blocked requests from React app to local API Enabled CORSMiddleware for local development origins FastAPI

title: Kubernetes HPA not scaling workers
description: Horizontal pod autoscaler stayed flat despite backlog growth
resolution: Added missing cpu requests and corrected metrics-server permissions
content: Kubernetes HPA not scaling workers Horizontal pod autoscaler stayed flat despite backlog growth Added missing cpu requests and corrected metrics-server permissions Kubernetes

title: Email alert webhook rejected
description: Monitoring system could not post to the notification endpoint because of malformed payload
resolution: Updated webhook template and validated signature settings
content: Email alert webhook rejected Monitoring system could not post to the notification endpoint because of malformed payload Updated webhook template and validated signature settings Integrations

title: Service account lacks S3 read access
description: Batch job failed when downloading reference files from object storage
resolution: Attached read policy to workload identity and restarted the job
content: Service account lacks S3 read access Batch job failed when downloading reference files from object storage Attached read policy to workload identity and restarted the job Permissions
